user.title: Create Request Group
user.description: Create a new request activation group that combines multiple boolean entities with OR logic.

data_description.name: A descriptive name for this request group (e.g., 'Hot Water Circulation Pump').

entities.title: Configure Entities
entities.description: Select the entities for this request group.

data_description.request_entities: Boolean entities that act as request sources. The output is ON when any of these is ON.
data_description.enabled_entity: Optional entity to enable/disable the group. When OFF, the output is always OFF regardless of requests.
data_description.target_entities: Optional entities to control directly. Will be turned on/off based on the activation state.

error.no_request_entities: You must select at least one request entity.

init.title: Configure Entities
init.description: Modify the entities for this request group.

data_description.request_entities: Boolean entities that act as request sources. The output is ON when any of these is ON.
data_description.enabled_entity: Optional entity to enable/disable the group. When OFF, the output is always OFF regardless of requests.
data_description.target_entities: Optional entities to control directly. Will be turned on/off based on the activation state.

error.no_request_entities: You must select at least one request entity.
